CAPI: Aggregated Events Manager
(AEM) Set Up
The Server Pixel (CAPI)
To make the best of your CAPI setup ensure that your domain is verified and
your events are prioritised.
Before watching the video read the guide from Facebook on verifying your
domain and setting up AEM.
I hope most that watch this are already aware of what this is and how to set it up
and I'm including it for those that are yet to set this up properly.
